the analysis correctly identifies the code as safe.\n- The source map comment is standard and does not introduce security concerns.\n\n---\n\n### Final assessment:\n**Based on the code and reports, I concur with the assigned scores.**  \n**However, considering the context of supply chain security,** I would assign the following:\n\n| Metric             | Suggested Score | Justification |\n|--------------------|-------------------|----------------|\n| Malware            | 0                 | No malicious activity or code present. |\n| Obfuscated         | 0                 | Code is clear, minimal, and not obfuscated. |\n| Security Risk      | 0                 | No vulnerabilities or risky behaviors detected. |\n\n**These scores are consistent with the analysis.**\n\n---\n\n### Summary:\n- The code is a benign, auto-generated module with source map references.\n- The reports are accurate and reasonable.\n- No changes to scores are necessary.\n- The overall risk, malware, and obfuscation scores should remain at 0.\n\n**Final note:** Always consider the context;
